mapper.select: SELECT id, perm_key, perm_name, module, description, create_time FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, perm_key, perm_name, module, description, create_time FROM sys_permission WHERE perm_key = #{permKey}
SELECT id, perm_key, perm_name, module, description, create_time FROM sys_permission ORDER BY module, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (perm_key, perm_name, module, description) VALUES (#{permKey}, #{permName}, #{module}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.perm_key, p.perm_name, p.module, p.description FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.module, p.id
